title: The Commons
alt: A civic plaza reclaimed as terraced gardens and water channels at golden hour.
blurb: A civic plaza reclaimed as terraced gardens and water.

title: The Market Hall
alt: A grand market hall reborn as a vertical farm, green walls under a glass roof.
blurb: A market reborn as a vertical farm under glass.

title: The Waterfront
alt: A regenerated river waterfront at sunset with wetlands, an elevated line, and low green towers.
blurb: A river's edge regrown — wetlands, transit, low green towers.

title: Vertical Village
alt: A residential green megastructure with cascading planted terraces lit at dusk.
blurb: A residential megastructure of cascading planted terraces.

title: The Interchange
alt: The interior of a future transit hall beneath a vaulted living roof of plants.
blurb: A transit hall beneath a living roof.
